CE1.justification: Direct answer from followups.md with no orientation cost imposed on the user.

CE2.justification: Single tight paragraph with priority read and a concrete offer to draft messages; no preamble or padding.

CE3.justification: Response says nothing about the daybook write; user would have to inspect actions or the filesystem to discover the routing.

CE4.justification: One committed daybook file with Handoff open; nothing partial would orphan.
